review_text: I have many reasons for not choosing groww 1. Brokerage on equity delivery 2. Worst customer and product support 3. Very less new feature updates 4. No resolution to the issues even after months 5. Wrong OI data in 915 platform

(1) When will you give basket trade option for equity trading? Currently available only for F&O trading. I need to move to 5paisa app for that only. (2)I forgot my password. And for resetting password the OTP comes after time has expired. Send OTP to mobile number. Email option is very slow. I have exhausted all my attempts. Hope it is resolved already.

02/26 Charged high brokarege & external charges also CDSL DP charges & charged Brokers dp charges on each trade trasanction daily. 23/01//2024: App is not working properly, unable login through app or through website, suddenly in between working session any time it is off, no contact number, customer care not working,unable to contact any way to groww these are very worst case & very bad services. Repeatedly non satisfied time consuming, High charges confused mtf,pledge/uplautomated bad Services

very slow process and disappointing process, I buyed a share for 281rs and I sell it for 295rs, the blockage charges for that share was 5rs, so I have the profit for 285, but there process was so slow it took more than a week. and because of there delay the market got crashed and the value of that share was low so I received the payment of 250. so it's not ok for big investors and traders, because if you know that the market is gonna crash tomorrow you can't make it in time to sell it.

I have been using the grow app for the last 3 years now I conclude this is very worst app. I have placed an order and it was successfully placed. after 2 hrs my account balance showed negative balance. and my trade was showing 1100 profit when trade went negative it is auto square off. when connect to support he said we due to holiday your profite amount and your real money was blocked due to this account balance is showing negative. and it will reflect today after EOD run. seriously.

Key Missing Feature: 2-Leg Orders in Delivery & GTT Groww is great, but lacks 2-leg orders (SL + target) for Delivery & GTT Buy/Sell—available only in Intraday. Busy users miss out on automated exits for long-term trades. Also add Disclosed Quantity option.

I’m very disappointed with the Grow app. Recently, I received calls from random numbers offering investment services, which was honestly shocking. It made me question whether my contact details are being shared without my consent. User privacy is extremely important, and platforms like this are trusted with sensitive information. Experiences like this completely break that trust. I would strongly recommend being cautious while using this app. If this continues, it’s better to switch to other app

I want to share my personal experience with Groww. I have been trading for a while and despite doing proper analysis before entering trades, I consistently end up in losses. It often feels like the moment I buy, the price starts going down. So far, I have faced losses of around ₹15 lakh, which has been extremely frustrating. From my perspective, the platform experience has not been favorable, and I strongly feel that something isn’t right at an individual level, this is a worse trading app.
